name: Cobblestone Bits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large microwave-safe bowl, combine the chocolate and butterscotch chips with the peanut butter.
2. Microwave at 70% power for about 5 minutes, stirring every minute until thoroughly melted and smooth.
3. Add the marshmallows and peanuts to the mixture.
4. Spread the mixture into a buttered 9x13-inch pan.
5. Cool at room temperature until set (refrigerate if desired, but return to room temperature before cutting).
YIELD: About 3 dozen 1 1/2 x 2 inches pieces.
